title: bidens biternata var. mayebarae
intro: Bidens biternata var. mayebarae is a rare variety of Bidens biternata, a species of plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is native to Japan and is used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Bidens biternata var. mayebarae include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, and is also used as a diuretic to promote urination and relieve edema.
